title: ERCOT Available Seasonal Capacity Forecast CSV download
description:
Available seasonal capacity forecast in ERCOT.

The forecasted demand (Load Forecast) and the forecasted available
seasonal capacity (Available Capacity) for the next 6 days.

The forecasted available seasonal capacity is comprised of non-renewable generators
based on seasonal capacity ratings without regard to the operating plans of these
units, minus any known outages or derates of these units, and the forecasted wind
and solar generation output.
